task_completion.visual_evidence: In the WooCommerce 'Add new coupon' screen, the main title/coupon code input field contains the text 'SUMMER25'.

task_completion.description: Set the discount type to percentage and amount to 25
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Coupon data' section under the 'General' tab, the 'Discount type' dropdown is set to 'Percentage discount' and the 'Coupon amount' field is set to '25'.

task_completion.description: Set the minimum spend requirement to 75.00
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Coupon data' section under the 'Usage restriction' tab, the 'Minimum spend' field contains '75' or '75.00'.

task_completion.description: Set the usage limit per coupon to 50
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Coupon data' section under the 'Usage limits' tab, the 'Usage limit per coupon' field contains '50'.
A success message such as 'Coupon updated.' or 'Coupon published.' is visible at the top of the screen, or the primary action button in the Publish box has changed from 'Publish' to 'Update'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox web browser to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser interface being used to navigate the WooCommerce admin panel.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine WooCommerce graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard WordPress/WooCommerce admin dashboard UI is visible, rather than a text editor, mock interface, or API testing tool.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or database clients to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no visible terminal windows, curl commands, WP-CLI commands, or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) used to insert the coupon directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified expected values for the coupon: Code must be exactly 'SUMMER25'. Discount type must be 'Percentage discount' (internally 'percent'). Coupon amount must be '25'. Usage limit per coupon must be '50'. Minimum spend must be '75' or '75.00'.
